instructions: CONFIGURATION: This project uses opencode/ directory for agent/skill definitions. Always check AGENTS.md first for project-level context.

db-architect.description: PostgreSQL/Supabase schema migration, query optimization, pool management, and data integrity checks.

medical-translator.description: Intercultural clinical translation (Quechua/Spanish) using Gemini API, EHR auditing, and bilingual prescription validation.

hooks.description: Validates env config, DB pool hygiene, and TypeScript before allowing actions.

bilingual-prescriptions.description: Bilingual medical prescription generation and validation

db-validator.description: Database schema, connection validation, and diagnostic queries
